caption: The cute snake game loads with a light, minimalist design using pastel colors and soft shadows.
Click 'Start Game' to begin playing. The snake is now alive and ready to move.
The game is now running. Watch as the snake automatically moves forward on the grid.
The snake has a cute face with animated eyes. The food appears as a peach-colored apple with a shine effect.
Press the right arrow key to steer the snake toward the food. The game responds smoothly to keyboard input.
When the snake eats food, the score increases by 10 points and the snake grows longer.
Use arrow keys or WASD to control the snake in all directions. The game prevents 180-degree turns for safety.
The mint green body segments show a subtle gradient for depth. Each segment is rounded for a soft, cute appearance.
Click 'Pause' to pause the game. You can then click 'Resume' to continue playing without resetting.
The game resumes from where you paused. The high score is saved in browser storage for persistence.
Click 'Reset' to start a fresh game. Your high score is preserved even after reset.
The status bar shows game state: 'Ready to play', '▶ Playing...', '⏸ Paused', or 'Game Over' with final score.
